message:
feat: Build Aho-Corasick automaton in Tokenizer.init()

Integration:
- Import AhoCorasick module
- Add aho_corasick field to Tokenizer struct
- Build automaton from vocab in both init functions
- Update deinit() to clean up automaton
- Fix trainer.zig to include aho_corasick field

Status:
- Aho-Corasick builds successfully ✅
- 100k vocab patterns compiled to double-array
- Still 33x slower (not used in encode yet)

Next: Replace HashMap encoder with Aho-Corasick lookups
